library.natural_language: What is the total billing for the item <ITEM_NAME> for the month of <MM> <YYYY>?

library.natural_language: What is the monthly billing trend for <YYYY>?
library.sql: WITH inv AS (SELECT STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%m') AS month, SUM(i.line_total) AS total FROM retail2.inventory_stock_inv1 i JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON i.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND i.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%Y') = '<YYYY>' GROUP BY STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%m')), ret AS (SELECT STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%m') AS month, SUM(r.line_total) AS total FROM retail2.sales_credit_notes_rin1 r JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON r.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND r.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%Y') = '<YYYY>' GROUP BY STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%m')) SELECT COALESCE(inv.month, ret.month) AS month, ROUND(COALESCE(inv.total, 0) - COALESCE(ret.total, 0), 2) AS net_billing FROM inv FULL OUTER JOIN ret ON inv.month = ret.month ORDER BY month

library.natural_language: What is the billing breakdown by store for <YYYY>?
library.sql: WITH inv AS (SELECT i.ocr_code, SUM(i.line_total) AS total FROM retail2.inventory_stock_inv1 i JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON i.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND i.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%Y') = '<YYYY>' GROUP BY i.ocr_code), ret AS (SELECT r.ocr_code, SUM(r.line_total) AS total FROM retail2.sales_credit_notes_rin1 r JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON r.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND r.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%Y') = '<YYYY>' GROUP BY r.ocr_code) SELECT CASE COALESCE(inv.ocr_code, ret.ocr_code) WHEN 'STR01' THEN 'Downtown Store' WHEN 'STR02' THEN 'Mall Store' WHEN 'STR03' THEN 'North Store' WHEN 'STR04' THEN 'Outlet' END AS store, ROUND(COALESCE(inv.total, 0) - COALESCE(ret.total, 0), 2) AS net_billing FROM inv FULL OUTER JOIN ret ON inv.ocr_code = ret.ocr_code ORDER BY net_billing DESC

library.natural_language: What is the average selling price of <ITEM_NAME> in <MM> <YYYY>?

library.sql: WITH inv AS (SELECT STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%m') AS month, SUM(i.quantity) AS total FROM retail2.inventory_stock_inv1 i JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON i.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND i.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%Y') = '<YYYY>' GROUP BY STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%m')), ret AS (SELECT STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%m') AS month, SUM(r.quantity) AS total FROM retail2.sales_credit_notes_rin1 r JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON r.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND r.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%Y') = '<YYYY>' GROUP BY STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%m')) SELECT COALESCE(inv.month, ret.month) AS month, ROUND(COALESCE(inv.total, 0) - COALESCE(ret.total, 0), 2) AS net_qty_sold FROM inv FULL OUTER JOIN ret ON inv.month = ret.month ORDER BY month

library.natural_language: What is the total number of units sold across all retail in <YYYY>?
library.sql: SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(i.quantity), 0) FROM retail2.inventory_stock_inv1 i JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON i.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND i.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%Y') = '<YYYY>') - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(r.quantity), 0) FROM retail2.sales_credit_notes_rin1 r JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON r.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND r.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%Y') = '<YYYY>') AS net_qty_sold

library.natural_language: What is the current stock of <ITEM_NAME>?
library.sql: SELECT o.item_name, SUM(s.on_hand) AS total_on_hand FROM retail2.master_stock_oitw s JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON s.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' GROUP BY o.item_name

library.natural_language: What is the stock of <ITEM_NAME> by warehouse?
library.sql: SELECT o.item_name, w.whs_name, s.on_hand FROM retail2.master_stock_oitw s JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON s.item_code = o.item_code JOIN retail2.master_warehouses_owhs w ON s.whs_code = w.whs_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND s.on_hand > 0 ORDER BY s.on_hand DESC

library.natural_language: Which items have low stock?
library.sql: SELECT o.item_name, SUM(s.on_hand) AS total_on_hand FROM retail2.master_stock_oitw s JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON s.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.sell_item = 'Y' AND o.valid_for = 'Y' AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' GROUP BY o.item_name HAVING SUM(s.on_hand) BETWEEN 1 AND 10 ORDER BY total_on_hand ASC

library.natural_language: What is the total stock on hand by warehouse?
library.sql: SELECT w.whs_name, SUM(s.on_hand) AS total_on_hand FROM retail2.master_stock_oitw s JOIN retail2.master_warehouses_owhs w ON s.whs_code = w.whs_code WHERE w.inactive != 'Y' GROUP BY w.whs_name ORDER BY total_on_hand DESC

library.natural_language: How many units of <ITEM_NAME> have been received overall?
library.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(m.in_qty), 0) AS total_received FROM retail2.master_inventory_log_oinm m JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON m.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND m.trans_type = 20

library.natural_language: How many units of <ITEM_NAME> were received in <MM> <YYYY>?
library.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(m.in_qty), 0) AS total_received FROM retail2.master_inventory_log_oinm m JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON m.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND m.trans_type = 20 AND STRFTIME(m.doc_date, '%Y') = '<YYYY>' AND STRFTIME(m.doc_date, '%m') = '<MM>'

library.natural_language: What are the stock transfers for <ITEM_NAME> in <YYYY>?
library.sql: SELECT m.warehouse, SUM(m.in_qty) AS transferred_in, SUM(m.out_qty) AS transferred_out FROM retail2.master_inventory_log_oinm m JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON m.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND m.trans_type = 67 AND STRFTIME(m.doc_date, '%Y') = '<YYYY>' GROUP BY m.warehouse ORDER BY transferred_in DESC

library.natural_language: What are the returns for <ITEM_NAME> in <MM> <YYYY>?

library.natural_language: What are the top 10 items by quantity sold in <YYYY>?
library.sql: WITH inv AS (SELECT i.item_code, SUM(i.quantity) AS total FROM retail2.inventory_stock_inv1 i JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON i.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND i.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%Y') = '<YYYY>' GROUP BY i.item_code), ret AS (SELECT r.item_code, SUM(r.quantity) AS total FROM retail2.sales_credit_notes_rin1 r JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON r.item_code = o.item_code WHERE o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND r.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%Y') = '<YYYY>' GROUP BY r.item_code) SELECT o.item_name, ROUND(COALESCE(inv.total,0)-COALESCE(ret.total,0),2) AS net_qty_sold FROM inv FULL OUTER JOIN ret ON inv.item_code=ret.item_code JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON COALESCE(inv.item_code,ret.item_code)=o.item_code ORDER BY net_qty_sold DESC LIMIT 10

library.sql: WITH inv AS (SELECT STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%m') AS month, SUM(i.line_total) AS total FROM retail2.inventory_stock_inv1 i JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON i.item_code=o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND i.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%Y')='<YYYY>' GROUP BY STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%m')), ret AS (SELECT STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%m') AS month, SUM(r.line_total) AS total FROM retail2.sales_credit_notes_rin1 r JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON r.item_code=o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND r.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%Y')='<YYYY>' GROUP BY STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%m')) SELECT COALESCE(inv.month,ret.month) AS month, ROUND(COALESCE(inv.total,0)-COALESCE(ret.total,0),2) AS net_billing FROM inv FULL OUTER JOIN ret ON inv.month=ret.month ORDER BY month

library.natural_language: What is the billing breakdown by store for <MM> <YYYY>?
library.sql: WITH inv AS (SELECT i.ocr_code, SUM(i.line_total) AS total FROM retail2.inventory_stock_inv1 i JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON i.item_code=o.item_code WHERE o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND i.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%Y')='<YYYY>' AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%m')='<MM>' GROUP BY i.ocr_code), ret AS (SELECT r.ocr_code, SUM(r.line_total) AS total FROM retail2.sales_credit_notes_rin1 r JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON r.item_code=o.item_code WHERE o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND r.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%Y')='<YYYY>' AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%m')='<MM>' GROUP BY r.ocr_code) SELECT CASE COALESCE(inv.ocr_code,ret.ocr_code) WHEN 'STR01' THEN 'Downtown Store' WHEN 'STR02' THEN 'Mall Store' WHEN 'STR03' THEN 'North Store' WHEN 'STR04' THEN 'Outlet' END AS store, ROUND(COALESCE(inv.total,0)-COALESCE(ret.total,0),2) AS net_billing FROM inv FULL OUTER JOIN ret ON inv.ocr_code=ret.ocr_code ORDER BY net_billing DESC

library.sql: WITH inv AS (SELECT i.ocr_code, SUM(i.quantity) AS total FROM retail2.inventory_stock_inv1 i JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON i.item_code=o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND i.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%Y')='<YYYY>' AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%m')='<MM>' GROUP BY i.ocr_code), ret AS (SELECT r.ocr_code, SUM(r.quantity) AS total FROM retail2.sales_credit_notes_rin1 r JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON r.item_code=o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND r.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%Y')='<YYYY>' AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%m')='<MM>' GROUP BY r.ocr_code) SELECT CASE COALESCE(inv.ocr_code,ret.ocr_code) WHEN 'STR01' THEN 'Downtown Store' WHEN 'STR02' THEN 'Mall Store' WHEN 'STR03' THEN 'North Store' WHEN 'STR04' THEN 'Outlet' END AS store, ROUND(COALESCE(inv.total,0)-COALESCE(ret.total,0),2) AS net_qty_sold FROM inv FULL OUTER JOIN ret ON inv.ocr_code=ret.ocr_code ORDER BY net_qty_sold DESC

library.sql: SELECT ROUND(((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(i.line_total),0) FROM retail2.inventory_stock_inv1 i JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON i.item_code=o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND i.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%Y')='<YYYY>') - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(r.line_total),0) FROM retail2.sales_credit_notes_rin1 r JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON r.item_code=o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND r.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%Y')='<YYYY>')) / NULLIF((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(i.quantity),0) FROM retail2.inventory_stock_inv1 i JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON i.item_code=o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND i.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%Y')='<YYYY>') - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(r.quantity),0) FROM retail2.sales_credit_notes_rin1 r JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON r.item_code=o.item_code WHERE o.item_name IN ('<ITEM_NAME>') AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND r.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%Y')='<YYYY>'),0),2) AS avg_selling_price

library.natural_language: What are the top 10 items by quantity sold this year?
library.sql: WITH inv AS (SELECT i.item_code, SUM(i.quantity) AS total FROM retail2.inventory_stock_inv1 i JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON i.item_code=o.item_code WHERE o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND i.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(i.doc_date, '%Y')=CAST(date_part('year',current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY i.item_code), ret AS (SELECT r.item_code, SUM(r.quantity) AS total FROM retail2.sales_credit_notes_rin1 r JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON r.item_code=o.item_code WHERE o.item_name NOT LIKE '%(DO NOT USE)%' AND r.ocr_code IN ('STR01','STR02','STR03','STR04') AND STRFTIME(r.doc_date, '%Y')=CAST(date_part('year',current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY r.item_code) SELECT o.item_name, ROUND(COALESCE(inv.total,0)-COALESCE(ret.total,0),2) AS net_qty_sold FROM inv FULL OUTER JOIN ret ON inv.item_code=ret.item_code JOIN retail2.master_articles_oitm o ON COALESCE(inv.item_code,ret.item_code)=o.item_code ORDER BY net_qty_sold DESC LIMIT 10

library.natural_language: What are the top 10 items by billing this year?
